title: Poggersotes
description: Modpack made for a server with my friends.
body:
Modpack made for a server that I bought with my friends. The reason its here is so its easier for them to keep up with mod updates, so that instead of sending them a file or having to delete it they can just press update. Also if anyone just finds this modpack and likes the mod list they are free to use it or move whatever they want, this is just a list of mods that I liked and resonated with.

Now for what it does: 
I see the modpack as an expansion to minecraft since I made it in mind of it being a vanilla plus experience. I also did this to make sure all my friends would be able to play it without any trouble.

It takes simply optimized on 1.20.1 fabric as its base and builds up from there.
The mods are:
It uses simply optimized as its base.

Also, all the dependencies that come from these mods.


Why would you want to download:
As of right now I've been having a lot of fun by myself or with my friends playing this modpack, you might find it interesting if you are a bit bored with the general minecraft experience or might have found it repetitive, or maybe you just think it needs a little bit of spice. I feel like this modpack that I put up finding a bunch of mods I liked would indeed cover that need for a lot of people or atleast it did for me and my friends. So yeah if you wanted minecraft to feel a bit more like an rpg with race selection, stats, action combat, and for it have more variety and some more things to do then this modpack is for you.

Critical information:
Its a pretty simple minecraft experience that just aims to expand upon what vanilla minecraft is and give you more things to do. I hope that anyone that finds this mod pack has as much fun as I've had with it. To clarify I didn't make any of these mods I just picked them out within modrinth  by making a custom modpack and now uploaded it here to share it to my friends and anyone who is interested, at most I've moved some values in the config of a mod here and there for balancing.
